candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the directional call as UNPROVEN and refuse to size up — conviction without any historical analog match is untested pattern space.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.60 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # freeze up-sizing until a historical analog confirms
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
